titleStmt.title: SII 24.378: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 378. (A.R. No. 261 of 1930.) II PRĀKĀRA, SĒṈAIMUDALIYĀR SHRINE, WEST WALL.

summary.p: Records a gift of 10,500 chakra-paṇam by Rāmānujadāsa alias Lakshmīpati-Śeṭṭi and his brother Antappa, sons of Tippu-Śeṭṭi of the Sahasra-gōtra who was a disciple of Kandāḍai Nayiṉār-Ayyaṅgār, for the midnight offerings to the god. This money was required to be invested in tanks and channels and the resultant revenue was to be spent for the purpose. Also registers a gift of money by the former for certain ornaments to the images of the god and the goddess. The details of date viz. Śaka 1446, Tāraṇa, Siṁha, śu. dvitīya, Uttiram, Wednesday correspond to 1524, A.D. August 1, Monday and not Wednesday. The record is dated in the reign of Tirumalaidēva Mahārāja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrīman mahārājādhirājan rājaparameśvaran śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvira
tirumalai devamahārāyar pradhuvirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 4 100 4 10 6 Itiṉ mel cellā niṉṟa dhāruṇasamvatsarattu simhanāyaṟṟu
pūrvvapakṣattu dvitiyaiyum Uttiramum peṟṟa saumyavārattu ṉāḷ tiruveṅka ṭam tiruppatiyil naraciṅka Irāyapātattil sahastragotraputrar Āṉa vāṇiparil kantāṭai nayiṉārayyaṅkār
śiṣyarāṉa Uṭaiyār tippuceṭṭiyār makaṉ Irāmānujadāsaṉāna lakṣmīpati ceṭṭi yāṟkkum meṟppaṭiyār tampi Antappaṉukkum poliyūṭṭu śilāśāsanam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi Iṟṟaināḷ tam
muṭaiya Upaiyamāka perumāḷu poliyūṭṭāka kaṭṭaḷai paṇṇiṉa taḷikai Oṉṟukku kaṭṭaḷaippaṭi tiruvaraṅkateva
ṉāl campā Amutupaṭi patakku neyyamutu Iruṉāḻi pālamutu mukkuṟuṇi paruppamutu Uḻakku cakkarai palam muppatu vāḻaippaḻam
Irupatu teṅkāy muṉṟu poriyamutu kkaṟi Amutu nālu campāram Erikarumpu Uḷpaṭa Inta kaṭṭaḷaiyile Irāttiri tiruvaraṅkac celvar Uḷḷe Eḻunta
ruḷina Aṉantaram Āka Amutuceytaruḷum Ilakṣmipati ceṭṭiyār Upaiyam tiruvatta cāmam taḷikai Oṉṟu Ituvum meṟpaṭiyār tampi Antappaṉ Upai
yam tiruvattacāmam taḷikai Oṉṟu Āka Amutu ceytaruḷum tiruvattacāma taḷikai Iraṇṭukkum tāṅkaḷ śrībhaṇḍārattile mutaliṭṭa cakkara ø 10000 5 100 Intappaṇam
patiṉāyirattaññūṟum perumāḷ śrī paṇṭārattil Ēri kālvāykaḷile Intap poṉ Iṭṭu Atikam piṟanta mutal koṇṭu Intat tiruvattacāma taḷikai Iraṇṭukkum kaṭṭaḷaippaṭi U
ṇṭānatu śrīpaṇṭārattile viṭṭu Ācandrārkkasthāyiyāka naṭakka[k* ka]ṭavatākavum Inta taḷikai Iraṇṭukkum viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu ṉāli
l Oṉṟukku tiruvattacāmama is written below the line.m ṉāṉāḻikku kantāṭai Irāmānujayyaṅkār Irāmānuja kūṭattukku tammuṭaiya Upayamāka śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷ Amutu cey
taruḷak kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭa tiruvattacāmam Iruṉāḻi kovil kantāṭai Aṇṇaṉ tiru māḷikaikku tiruvattacāmam nāḻi kayiṅkariyam Appa
yaṅkāṟku nāḻiyum Ākat tiruvattacāmam nāṉāḻiyum nāḷtoṟum peṟṟuvarac kaṭavārkaḷ Ākavum Ituvum lakṣmīpati ceṭṭiyār kaiyṅkarya māka
samarppitta Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷapperumāḷ tiruvaṭikaḷil cātti Aruḷa navaratnakkali Āṉa Aṅkiliraṇṭukkup paṇam paṉṉirāyiram nāyakam vai
ḍūryyappatakkam Oṉṟukkup paṇam Iraṇṭāyirattu Iruṉūṟu nilamiṭṭa 2 li Oṉṟukkup paṇam Āyiram nācciyār śrīraṅganāyakiyāṟ(k)ku
tiruccilampu coṭu Oṉṟukkum maṅkallatti veḷḷittaṭṭi muṉṟukkum melppaṭi taṭṭi Iraṇṭukkum paṇam Āyiram paṭṭupporvai O
ṉṟum poṇam nālum kuṭai Iraṇṭum veḷḷikkuñcam Oṉṟukkum paṇam Āyiram Ākat tām samarppitta tiruvāparaṇam (p)paṭṭu vakai
kkum tammuṭayai colappaṭṭa vilai Āvatāna paṇam patine �ttirunūṟu Āka Inta vakaippaṭi perumāḷum ṉācciyārum cātti Aru
ḷak kaṭavatākavum §
Digital edition of SII 24.378 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
